description:
LUMEN turns your scattered self-care habits into two effortless daily rituals — one in the morning, one in the evening.

Most routines fall apart because they live only in your head. LUMEN gives them structure: a guided daily flow with live timers, one-tap step completion, and a quiet sense of progress building beneath everything you do.

YOUR SHELF, MADE INTELLIGENT

Scan a barcode or take a photo and LUMEN identifies your skincare, hair, and grooming products instantly. It tracks expiration dates, calculates the true cost per use, and builds a working knowledge of your shelf over time.

The built-in AI Advisor draws on what you actually own. Ask it how to layer your serums correctly, whether two actives will clash, or what your routine might be missing. Every answer is grounded in your real products and personal goals — not generic advice from the internet.

WATCH YOURSELF CHANGE

Weekly progress photos, consistency scores, and streak tracking across five domains — skin, hair, grooming, sleep, and health — give you an honest picture of how far you have come. Earn collectible milestone medals from Bronze all the way to Obsidian as your dedication compounds.

When you are ready to reflect or share, export a beautifully formatted PDF journey of your full self-care history.

ALWAYS ONE GLANCE AWAY

Lock Screen widgets and Live Activity support put your next ritual step right where you already are. No unlocking, no searching. Just show up and follow the flow.

PRIVATE BY DESIGN

Your data lives on your device. No account is required to get started. Optional sign-in unlocks backup and sync across your devices — nothing more.

FREE AND GOLD

LUMEN is free to download. Build complete morning and evening rituals, track your streaks, and add up to five products at no cost.

LUMEN Gold ($1.99/month or $10.99/year) unlocks the AI Advisor, unlimited products, unlimited progress photos, deeper insights, full streak features, PDF export, and all themes.

Begin your ritual today.

https://lumenritual.ai/privacy
https://lumenritual.ai/terms
promotionalText: Guided rituals for skin, hair, sleep & health — with AI that knows your shelf. Free to start. LUMEN Gold from $1.99/month.
